offer: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant screenings/month, manual tracking causes delays in tenant approvals. We automate the scheduling and sending of reports instead of manual tracking and emailing of reports.
problem: Inefficient scheduling and sending of tenant screening reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow improvements
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try email notifications for completed screenings
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing tenant data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
